candidates.title: Digital Imitation Jewellery Catalogue
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for layered/retouched assets and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I own a fast-growing imitation jewellery brand and I’m ready to showcase the new collection in a polished digital catalogue that I can push straight to social media. The goal is a visually rich, scroll-stopping piece that works perfectly as an Instagram carousel, Facebook post, and story highlight while still living on in a shareable PDF. Here’s what I need from you: • A cohesive concept and layout that mirrors the sparkle and colour of our pieces, using on-trend typography and plenty of white space so the jewellery remains centre stage. • Final files sized for popular social platforms (1080×1350 px portrait and 1080×1080 px square) plus a hi-res PDF for download. • Editable source files—Adobe InDesign, Photoshop, or Canva are all fine—so my team can update pricing later. • Quick turnaround; I’d like to publish this as soon as possible, so efficiency is key. I can provide product photos,

candidates.title: Amazon Jewelry Listing Assistance Needed
candidates.brief: I have a new line of jewellery ready to be added to my Amazon Seller Central account, but I’m only part-way there. SKUs, some specs and a handful of high-resolution images are already organised; what’s missing are polished, keyword-rich product descriptions and a sensible pricing structure that positions each item competitively without eroding margin. Here’s exactly what I’m expecting: • Product descriptions – SEO-friendly titles, bullet points and backend search terms written in the tone Amazon shoppers expect for fine jewellery. • Pricing details – research-driven price recommendations that account for Amazon fees, competitor benchmarks and my desired profit targets. Each ASIN should be fully compliant with Amazon jewellery category requirements, free of prohibited phrases, and upload-ready via flat file or direct entry. candidates.title: Corporate B2B Quote Website Build
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I need a WordPress-powered site that presents our merchandise and corporate-branding solutions in a catalogue style using WooCommerce, but without the standard cart or checkout. Every product page must lead visitors toward “Get a Quote” and a direct WhatsApp chat instead of “Add to Cart”. Design & branding The visual tone has to feel corporate and professional, matching the look of our existing logo and colour palette. While I don’t have a full brand guide, the colours and mark are set, so the theme and typography should revolve around them. Content structure The homepage should spotlight our Business Services range while still allowing visitors to explore Apparels & Accessories, Gifts, Events, Packaging & Containers, Textile–Apparel Clothing and Merchandise Trader collections through a clean filter or mega-menu. candidates.title: Luxury Gifting Catalogue & Posts
candidates.tools: InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m refreshing the visual identity of Giftology Studio, Jaipur, and need a creative partner who can translate our premium, luxurious vibe into tangible assets. The first milestone is a coffee-table-worthy catalogue that spotlights our gifting hampers in their best light—think clean layouts, clear hierarchy, and plenty of room for the products to shine. Alongside that, I want a bank of Instagram posts that carry the same sumptuous look and feel, so the transition from print to digital is seamless. Your scope will touch every step of the process—from mood-boarding and product styling all the way to coordinating or art-directing the photoshoots if you’re local or have remote solutions. Strong storytelling is key; each spread, post, and hero shot should whisper “exclusivity” while still feeling warm and inviting. candidates.title: Bakery B2B Catalog Development
candidates.brief: I'm looking for a skilled designer to develop a digital PDF catalog for my bakery business targeting B2B distributors. Requirements: - Comprehensive product descriptions - Detailed pricing information - High-quality images for every product Ideal Skills & Experience: - Graphic design proficiency - Experience in creating digital catalogs - Strong attention to detail - Portfolio showcasing similar work Looking forward to your proposals!

candidates.title: Belizz Bamboo Pad Reseller Partners
candidates.brief: I now want to open solid, long-term partnerships across Asia with businesses that can take bulk stock and resell it under the Belizz brand or white-label, whichever best fits your market. Who I need • Established distributors with a sales network in pharmacies, supermarkets, or specialty eco-stores. • Online marketplace operators or high-traffic e-commerce sellers who can list and promote the pads directly to consumers. What I bring to the table • Consistent supply of finished Belizz bamboo sanitary pads, packed and ready for retail. • Flexible minimum order quantities to help you test the line before scaling up. What I’m looking for from you • The ability to commit to regular bulk orders. • Local marketing or platform reach to move product quickly. • Reliable payment and import handling in your territory.
